seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Engineering for max tokens/watt in LLMs involves very low voltage high current domains at tiny distances, opposite to power transmission lines; enables interactive tokens/sec/user at cluster scale with advanced memory tech.
Fable (agent model) returning to AbacusAI xHigh mode alongside Opus 4.8 and GPT 5.5 for complex agentic tasks and app building; triggers on SuperComputer for professional/enterprise use.

Tutorial on Gemini Live + Deep Agents for voice research agents: low-latency natural speech-to-speech combined with long-running subagent tasks, full tracing via LangSmith; human-in-loop for wiki memory systems.
OpenAI benchmark for AI agents on realistic computational biology: messy data inspection, bad sample detection, analysis path selection, assumption revision, defensible conclusions beyond simple Q&A.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Verifiable cryptographic identity, programmable spend controls, and kill switch for autonomous onchain AI agents transacting across chains/DEXs.
near_misses.reason: Focuses on agent infrastructure but crypto-oriented, not core AI technical innovation like frameworks or memory.
